steps.title: Apply the multiplier from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $8x-1 = -10$. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Multiplying the given equation by 2 on each side yields $2 \times (4x - \frac{1}{2}) = 2 \times - 5$. Applying the distributive property, this equation can be rewritten as $2 \times 4x - 2 \times \frac{1}{2} = 2 \times - 5$, or $8x - 1 = - 10$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C are incorrect and may result from calculation errors in solving the given equation for $x$ and then substituting that value of x in the expression $8x - 1$.
